title: tetraphyle pyramidalis var. cylindrica
intro: Tetraphyle pyramidalis var. cylindrica, also known as four-angled pyramidal tetraphylle or four-angled pyramidal tetraphylum, is a variant of the Tetraphyle pyramidalis plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Tetraphyle pyramidalis var. cylindrica include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and alleviate sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are administered orally to harness its medicinal properties.
